message.content:
{
  "lean_declaration": "theorem det_add_smul_col (A : Matrix (Fin n) (Fin n) K) (i j : Fin n) (hij : i ≠ j) (c : K) :\n    (A.updateCol i (fun k => A k i + c • A k j)).det = A.det := by\n  have htrans : (A.updateCol i (fun k => A k i + c • A k j)).transpose =\n      A.transpose.updateRow i ((A.transpose) i + c • (A.transpose) j) := by\n    ext a b\n    by_cases h : a = i\n    · simp [h, Matrix.updateCol_apply, Matrix.updateRow_apply, Matrix.transpose_apply]\n    · simp [h, Matrix.updateCol_apply, Matrix.updateRow_apply, Matrix.transpose_apply]\n  calc\n    (A.updateCol i (fun k => A k i + c • A k j)).det = (A.updateCol i (fun k => A k i + c • A k j)).transpose.det := by\n      rw [Matrix.det_transpose]\n    _ = (A.transpose.updateRow i ((A.transpose) i + c • (A.transpose) j)).det := by rw [htrans]\n    _ = A.transpose.det := by rw [det_add_smul_row (A.transpose) i j hij c]\n    _ = A.det := by rw [Matrix.det_transpose]",
  "declaration_name": "det_add_smul_col",
  "used_context": [
    "det_add_smul_row",
    "Matrix.det_transpose",
    "Matrix.updateCol_apply",
    "Matrix.updateRow_apply",
    "Matrix.transpose_apply"
  ],
  "notes": [
    "Proved using the transpose trick, applying the existing row operation theorem det_add_smul_row to the transpose."
  ]
}
